allow: Bash(python3 -c "import cyberwave" 2>&1; python3 -m pip show cyberwave 2>&1)
Bash(set -a && source .env && set +a && python3 robot_controller.py status 2>&1)

Bash(set -a && source .env && set +a && PLIST=~/Library/LaunchAgents/ai.openclaw.gateway.plist && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Add :EnvironmentVariables:TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN string $TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" "$PLIST" && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Add :EnvironmentVariables:CYBERWAVE_TWIN_ID string $CYBERWAVE_TWIN_ID" "$PLIST" && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Add :EnvironmentVariables:CYBERWAVE_API_KEY string $CYBERWAVE_API_KEY" "$PLIST" && echo "Done")
Bash(PLIST=~/Library/LaunchAgents/ai.openclaw.gateway.plist && launchctl unload "$PLIST" 2>/dev/null || true && launchctl load "$PLIST" && echo "Daemon reloaded")
